name: jami-harness
description: Jami Harness docs, roadmap, contracts, runtime, and governance foundation.

scripts.verify: node scripts/docs/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/release/generate-capability-manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/hosted/generate-hosted-routes.mjs --check && node packages/docs/scripts/generate-docs.mjs --check && node apps/workbench/scripts/generate-workbench.mjs --check && node packages/contracts/scripts/generate-contracts.mjs --check && node packages/contracts/scripts/validate-contracts.mjs && node scripts/release/generate-sbom.mjs --check && node scripts/release/check-package-contents.mjs --contents --check && node scripts/release/check-package-contents.mjs --smoke --check && node --test packages/policy/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/runtime/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/tools/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/provider-local/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/artifacts/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/observability/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/memory/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/store-local/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/sdk/test/*.test.mjs && node --test apps/cli/test/*.test.mjs && node --test apps/workbench/test/*.test.mjs && node examples/local-evidence-run.mjs && node evals/smoke.mjs && node scripts/release/check-readiness.mjs && node scripts/release/check-readiness.mjs --dry-run
